title: The Body It Asked For – AI, hardware, and the long way back to atoms
abstract: Have you ever dreamed of customizing your own body? The Body It Asked For is not just a dream but a fascinating journey through technology and hardware. From atoms to molecules, from chips to the human body, this voyage takes you on an unprecedented transformation. Join us on an expedition about "me"!
abstract_zh: 你有没有想过，未来是不是可以定制自己的身体？《The Body It Asked For》不仅是一个梦想，更是一次科技与硬件的奇妙旅程。从原子到分子，从芯片到人体，这趟旅行带你体验前所未有的改变。来吧，一起踏上这场关于“我”的探险！
